Embedded Systems Partner

Ongoing systems support after the first workflow ships: deeper workflow discovery, tighter integrations, automation backlog management, AI governance, dashboards, and team adoption.

Includes

  • Monthly systems roadmap and priority sequencing.
  • Operating cadence and owner accountability.
  • Workflow design, automation, and reporting improvements.
  • AI governance, review loops, and tool adoption support.
  • Vendor, stack, and implementation oversight.
  • Team handoff, documentation, and continuous cleanup.

Best for

Founder-led teams that need a technical systems partner to keep finding, building, integrating, and training after the first automation works.
